name: ISCC EU 2024 v1
description: International Sustainability and Carbon Certification – EU 2024 edition. Covers GHG methodology, land-use criteria, social principles, and legal compliance under RED II/III.

requirements.name: Scope 1 Direct GHG Emissions
requirements.description: Total direct GHG emissions from owned or controlled sources.
requirements.guidanceText: Include diesel combustion, natural gas, and POME methane. Report in tCO2e.

requirements.name: Scope 2 Grid Electricity Consumption
requirements.guidanceText: Obtain monthly electricity bills and apply the applicable grid emission factor.

requirements.name: GHG Intensity per Tonne CPO
requirements.description: Total net GHG emissions per tonne of CPO produced.
requirements.guidanceText: Divide total Scope 1+2 tCO2e by tonnes of CPO produced.

requirements.name: POME Methane Capture Evidence
requirements.description: Documentary evidence that POME methane is captured and flared or utilised.
requirements.guidanceText: Upload the POME capture system inspection report.

requirements.name: Scheduled Waste Disposal Records
requirements.description: Documented records of all scheduled/hazardous waste lawfully disposed.
requirements.guidanceText: Attach waste disposal manifests from licensed contractors.

requirements.name: EFB Application Rate
requirements.description: Rate of empty fruit bunch applied as field mulch per hectare.
requirements.guidanceText: Include records from the land application logbook.

requirements.name: No High Carbon Stock Land Conversion
requirements.description: Confirmation that all FFB supplied to the mill originates from land not converted from areas of high biodiversity value (primary forest, protected areas, peatland) after January 2008, per ISCC EU Principles 1 and 2.
requirements.guidanceText: Obtain and retain current RSPO, MSPO, or equivalent certification evidence for each FFB supplier, or complete the ISCC-compliant supplier due-diligence declaration. Flag any supplier without valid certification for corrective action.

requirements.name: Minimum Wage Compliance Declaration
requirements.description: Declaration that all workers are paid at or above statutory minimum wage.
requirements.guidanceText: Attach payroll summary and sign the compliance declaration form.

requirements.name: Grievance Cases Recorded
requirements.description: Number of worker grievance cases recorded and resolved.
requirements.guidanceText: Enter the count of grievances opened and separately resolved.

requirements.name: Lost-Time Injury Rate (LTIR)
requirements.description: Number of lost-time injuries per million hours worked.

requirements.name: Safety Training Hours
requirements.description: Total safety training hours delivered to mill workers.
requirements.guidanceText: Include induction, toolbox talks, and formal safety courses.

requirements.name: Legal Compliance Declaration
requirements.description: Annual declaration that the mill operates in full compliance with all applicable national and local laws, including environmental permits, labour regulations, land-use rights, and tax obligations.
requirements.guidanceText: Complete and sign the annual legal compliance self-declaration form. Attach copies of current operating licenses, environmental permits (DOE approval), and evidence that any regulatory notices or corrective-action requests have been resolved.
